name: _ValidateImageBase
asm:
0x140002490      XOR      EAX, EAX
  0x140002492      CMP      word ptr [RCX], 0x5a4d
  0x140002497      JNZ      0x1400024a8
  0x140002499      MOVSXD   RDX, dword ptr [RCX + 0x3c]
  0x14000249D      ADD      RCX, RDX
  0x1400024A0      CMP      dword ptr [RCX], 0x4550
  0x1400024A6      JZ       0x1400024b0
  0x1400024A8      RET      
  0x1400024B0      XOR      EAX, EAX
  0x1400024B2      CMP      word ptr [RCX + 0x18], 0x20b
  0x1400024B8      SETZ     AL
  0x1400024BB      RET
